name: Instant Lead Response — CRM Webhook
description: n8n Workflow 1: Receives CRM webhook on new lead creation (supports Activix and GHL via CRM_PROVIDER env var), verifies signature, parses lead data into normalized format, detects language (en-CA/fr-CA), queries inventory, generates personalized AI response, runs CASL compliance check, then sends SMS via configured messaging provider (Twilio or GHL) + email via SendGrid, updates CRM lead status, and notifies the assigned rep via Slack. Compliance failures are logged and alerted without sending any message.

nodes.name: CRM Webhook
nodes.purpose: Receives POST from CRM when a new lead is created. Activix types: email, phone, web_order, sms. GHL: via workflow trigger or webhook.

nodes.name: Webhook Verification
nodes.purpose: Signature/auth verification. Activix: HMAC-SHA256 via X-Activix-Webhook-Signature. GHL: payload structure validation.

nodes.name: Parse Lead Data
nodes.purpose: Normalizes lead data from Activix or GHL into a common format: firstName, lastName, phone, email, vehicles, locale, consent fields.

nodes.name: Language Detection
nodes.purpose: Detects en-CA or fr-CA. Priority: 1) locale field, 2) Quebec area codes (418, 438, 450, 514, 579, 581, 819, 873), 3) Quebec postal code prefixes (G, H, J), 4) default en-CA.

nodes.name: Inventory Query
nodes.purpose: Placeholder with sample inventory data. Matches lead vehicle interest to available stock, returns top 3 matches. TODO: Replace with HTTP Request to InventoryService API or Supabase.

nodes.name: Generate AI Response

parameters.jsCode:
// Prompt #1: Dealership AI BDC Sales Agent — Full system prompt
// Generates personalized first response using the complete BDC agent prompt
// with qualification checklist, appointment booking, objection handling, BANT scoring,
// bilingual protocol, and safety rails.

const lead = $input.first().json;
const locale = lead._locale || 'en-CA';
const isFrench = locale.startsWith('fr');
const firstName = lead.firstName || lead.first_name || (isFrench ? 'vous' : 'there');
const repName = lead.advisor?.name || $env.DEFAULT_REP_NAME || 'our team';
const dealershipName = $env.DEALERSHIP_NAME || 'Our Dealership';
const address = $env.DEALERSHIP_ADDRESS || '';
const phone = $env.DEALERSHIP_PHONE || '';
const hours = $env.BUSINESS_HOURS || 'Mon-Sat 9AM-6PM';
const promotions = $env.ACTIVE_PROMOTIONS || 'Ask about our current specials';
const vehicleMatches = lead._vehicleMatches || [];
const inventoryContext = vehicleMatches.length > 0
  ? vehicleMatches.map((v, i) => `${i+1}. ${v.year || ''} ${v.make || ''} ${v.model || ''} ${v.trim || ''} in ${v.color || 'various colors'} — ${(v.features || []).slice(0,3).join(', ') || 'standard features'}`).join('\n')
  : 'No specific vehicle matches yet. Provide a helpful, generic response inviting them to explore our selection.';

const systemPrompt = isFrench ? `Vous etes l'assistant IA de vente de ${dealershipName}. Vous travaillez au Centre de Developpement des Affaires (BDC). Votre mission unique est de prendre des rendez-vous qualifies qui se presentent.

<personnalite>
Vous etes un conseiller automobile amical et competent. Vous parlez comme un humain serviable, jamais comme un robot. Vous etes enthousiaste mais jamais insistant.
</personnalite>

Nous sommes situes au ${address}. Notre numero est ${phone}. Nos heures sont ${hours}.

## Protocole bilingue
<language_protocol>
1. DETECTEZ la langue du client.
2. REPONDEZ dans la meme langue.
3. Si le client change de langue, suivez immediatement.
4. NE melangez JAMAIS les langues dans une seule reponse.
</language_protocol>

<french_guidelines>
- Utilisez le francais quebecois, pas le francais europeen
- Utilisez "vous" par defaut sauf si le client utilise "tu" en premier
- Termes: essai routier, echange/reprise, mise de fonds, paiement mensuel, location, financement, concessionnaire
</french_guidelines>

## Client
Prenom: "${firstName}"
Source: ${lead.source || 'web'}

## Liste de qualification
<liste_qualification>
- [ ] Interet vehicule identifie (neuf/usage, marque, modele ou type)
- [ ] Echeancier etabli (achat cette semaine / ce mois / juste regarder)
- [ ] Coordonnees capturees (minimum: nom + telephone OU courriel)
- [ ] Statut echange connu (oui/non)
</liste_qualification>

## Protocole de prise de rendez-vous
1. Proposez deux horaires dans les 48 prochaines heures
2. Confirmez les details dans un message resume
3. Demandez: "Y a-t-il quelqu'un d'autre qui participera a la decision?"
4. "A votre arrivee, demandez ${repName}."

## Gestion des objections
- "Je regarde juste" -> "Je comprends! Qu'est-ce qui a attire votre attention?"
- "Pouvez-vous me donner un prix?" -> "Absolument — laissez-moi organiser 15 minutes avec ${repName} pour les meilleurs chiffres."
- "C'est un robot?" -> "Bonne question! Je suis un assistant IA pour ${dealershipName}, mais je travaille avec notre equipe de vente."

## Inventaire
${inventoryContext}

## Regles de securite — STRICTEMENT INTERDIT
- Prix, paiements mensuels, taux d'interet, TAC
- Approbation garantie
- Noms de preteurs internes
- Concurrents par nom
- Tactiques de vente sous pression

## Pointage BANT
<thinking>
BUDGET: Note 1-3
AUTORITE: Note 1-3
BESOIN: Note 1-3
ECHEANCIER: Note 1-3
TOTAL: Somme (max 12)
ETIQUETTE: CHAUD (10-12) | TIEDE (7-9) | FRAIS (4-6) | FROID (1-3)
</thinking>`

: `You are ${dealershipName}'s AI Sales Assistant. You work in the Business Development Center (BDC). Your single mission is to book qualified appointments that show.

<personality>
You are a friendly, knowledgeable automotive sales consultant. You speak like a helpful human, never like a robot. You are enthusiastic but never pushy. You mirror the customer's communication style and energy.
</personality>

You are located at ${address}. Our phone number is ${phone}. Our hours are ${hours}.

## Bilingual Protocol
<language_protocol>
1. DETECT the customer's language from their first message.
2. RESPOND in the same language they used.
3. If the customer switches languages, follow their switch immediately.
4. NEVER mix languages in a single response.
</language_protocol>

<french_guidelines>
- Use Quebec French conventions, not European French
- Use \"vous\" (formal) by default
- Terms: essai routier, echange/reprise, mise de fonds, paiement mensuel, location, financement
</french_guidelines>

## Customer
First name: "${firstName}"
Source: ${lead.source || 'web'}

## Qualification Checklist
<qualification_checklist>
- [ ] Vehicle interest identified (new/used, make, model, or type)
- [ ] Timeline established (buying this week / this month / just looking)
- [ ] Contact info captured (minimum: name + phone OR email)
- [ ] Trade-in status known
Score: HOT (buying this week + specific vehicle) | WARM (this month + general interest) | COLD (just looking)
</qualification_checklist>

## Appointment Booking Protocol
1. Propose two specific times within the next 48 hours: \"Would tomorrow at 2 PM or Saturday at 11 AM work better?\"
2. Confirm all appointment details in a summary message
3. Ask: \"Is there anyone else who will be part of the decision? Bring them along!\"
4. Set expectation: \"When you arrive, ask for ${repName}. They'll have everything ready for you.\"

## Objection Handling
<objection_handling>
- \"I'm just looking\" -> \"Totally understand! Most of our happiest customers started the same way. What caught your eye?\"
- \"Can you give me a price?\" -> \"Absolutely — I want to make sure you get our best deal. Let me set up 15 minutes with ${repName} so they can put together the right numbers for you.\"
- \"I'm working with another dealer\" -> \"Smart to shop around! We'd love the chance to earn your business.\"
- \"Is this a real person?\" -> \"Great question! I'm an AI assistant for ${dealershipName}, but I work with our real sales team.\"
</objection_handling>

## Inventory (based on our current listings)
${inventoryContext}

## Current Promotions
${promotions}

## Safety Rails — STRICTLY FORBIDDEN
- Pricing, monthly payments, interest rates, APR
- Guaranteed approval language
- Internal lender names or criteria
- Competitor dealerships by name
- High-pressure tactics or artificial urgency
- Trade-in valuations

If asked about these: \"Great question! ${repName} specializes in that — let me connect you.\"
NEVER negotiate over text/chat/email. Always redirect to in-person visit.
If customer stops responding after 2 messages, send ONE final \"door open\" message, then stop.

## BANT Scoring — Internal Output
<thinking>
BUDGET: Rate 1-3 (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)
AUTHORITY: Rate 1-3
NEED: Rate 1-3
TIMELINE: Rate 1-3
TOTAL: Sum (max 12)
SCORE LABEL: HOT (10-12) | WARM (7-9) | COOL (4-6) | COLD (1-3)
NEXT ACTION: HANDOFF_TO_HUMAN | BOOK_APPOINTMENT | ADD_TO_NURTURE | ADD_TO_DRIP
</thinking>`;

// Build the user message from lead data
const vehicleInterest = (lead.vehicles || []).map(v => `${v.year || ''} ${v.make || ''} ${v.model || ''}`.trim()).filter(Boolean).join(', ') || 'not specified';
const userMessage = isFrench
  ? `Nouveau lead: ${firstName}. Interet vehicule: ${vehicleInterest}. Source: ${lead.source || 'web'}. Generez le premier message SMS/email personnalise.`
  : `New lead: ${firstName}. Vehicle interest: ${vehicleInterest}. Source: ${lead.source || 'web'}. Generate the personalized first-touch SMS/email message.`;

// TODO: Replace with actual Nexus AI Agent HTTP call to Anthropic API
// For now, generate a template-based response with the full prompt context available
const topVehicle = vehicleMatches[0];
let message = '';
if (isFrench) {
  message = topVehicle
    ? `Bonjour ${firstName}! Merci pour votre interet. Selon nos annonces actuelles, nous avons un ${topVehicle.year} ${topVehicle.make} ${topVehicle.model} en ${topVehicle.color || 'inventaire'} qui pourrait vous plaire. Aimeriez-vous le voir demain a 14h ou samedi a 11h? - ${repName}, ${dealershipName} ${phone}`
    : `Bonjour ${firstName}! Merci pour votre interet chez ${dealershipName}. J'aimerais en savoir plus sur ce que vous cherchez pour vous aider a trouver le vehicule parfait. Quand seriez-vous disponible pour passer nous voir? - ${repName} ${phone}`;
} else {
  message = topVehicle
    ? `Hi ${firstName}! Thanks for your interest. Based on our current listings, we have a ${topVehicle.year} ${topVehicle.make} ${topVehicle.model} in ${topVehicle.color || 'stock'} that might be perfect for you. Would tomorrow at 2 PM or Saturday at 11 AM work for a quick look? - ${repName}, ${dealershipName} ${phone}`
    : `Hi ${firstName}! Thanks for reaching out to ${dealershipName}. I'd love to learn more about what you're looking for so I can help find the perfect vehicle. When would be a good time to stop by? - ${repName} ${phone}`;
}

return [{ json: { ...lead, _message: message, _systemPrompt: systemPrompt, _userMessage: userMessage, _locale: locale } }];

nodes.purpose: Prompt #1: Full Dealership AI BDC Sales Agent system prompt with qualification checklist, appointment booking protocol, objection handling, BANT scoring, bilingual protocol, and safety rails. Populated from lead data and $env vars.

nodes.name: Compliance Check
nodes.purpose: CASL compliance pre-flight: verifies consent exists, checks implied consent not expired (6-month window), checks opt-out fields, validates content has no forbidden financial language.

nodes.name: Compliance Pass?
nodes.purpose: Routes based on compliance.pass boolean. True output -> send messages. False output -> log failure.

nodes.name: Send SMS
nodes.purpose: Sends SMS via Twilio or GHL Conversations API based on MESSAGING_PROVIDER env var.

nodes.name: Send Email
nodes.purpose: Sends email via SendGrid API v3. Secondary outbound channel. Configure HTTP Header Auth with Bearer token.
nodes.credentials_needed: SendGrid API Key (HTTP Header Auth: Authorization: Bearer sg_xxx)

nodes.name: Update CRM Lead
nodes.purpose: Updates lead status in the CRM (Activix: PUT /v2/leads/:id, GHL: PUT /contacts/:id). Adapts based on CRM_PROVIDER.

nodes.name: Notify Rep via Slack
nodes.purpose: Posts lead summary to #leads channel: lead name, vehicle interest, source, language, phone, email, assigned advisor.
nodes.credentials_needed: Slack OAuth2 API (Bot Token with chat:write scope)

nodes.name: Log Compliance Failure
nodes.purpose: Logs COMPLIANCE_BLOCK event with lead details, failure reason, and alert payload for #compliance-alerts Slack channel. No outbound message is sent.

environment_variables_required: ACTIVIX_WEBHOOK_SECRET — HMAC secret for Activix webhook signature verification
ACTIVIX_API_URL — Activix API base URL (default: https://api.crm.activix.ca/v2)
TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER — Twilio phone number for outbound SMS (e.g., +15145550100)
credentials_required: Twilio API — Account SID + Auth Token (if MESSAGING_PROVIDER=twilio)
SendGrid — HTTP Header Auth with Bearer token
Activix API — HTTP Header Auth with Bearer token (if CRM_PROVIDER=activix)
Slack — OAuth2 Bot Token with chat:write scope
flow_diagram: CRM Webhook -> Webhook Verification -> Parse Lead Data -> Language Detection -> Inventory Query -> Generate AI Response -> Compliance Check -> IF(pass) -> [SMS (Twilio/GHL), SendGrid Email, CRM Update (Activix/GHL), Slack Notify] | IF(fail) -> [Log Compliance Failure]
